subcodes.first_line: O Nasru'llah! Hearken unto the Call from the Lofty Tree upon the snow-white earth, upon the shore of the sea of bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا نصرالله اسمع الندآء من السدره المرتفعه علی الارض البیضاء شاطی بحر عنایه
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @exhortations and counsels
